case_title: STATE OF CALIF. EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. JOE M SOLANA

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIF. EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT SOLANA, JOE M JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. TE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY $100.00 PER MONTH TOWARD THE DEBT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIF. EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIF. EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLANA, JOE M $1,076.00 PRINCIPAL, $122.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,198.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
